title: REUNIFICATION PROTOCOL — ANDREW & L.D.W.
subtitle: Graduated Reintroduction Based on Attachment Theory + Michigan Guidelines

phases.name: REINTRODUCTION (Week 1-2)
phases.goal: Reestablish father-child bond in safe, structured setting

schedule.activity: 2-hour supervised visits at neutral location (library, park)

guidelines: Let L.D.W. set the pace — no forcing physical contact
Bring familiar toys/items from before separation
Keep routine predictable — same time, same location
No negative talk about Emily — EVER (MCL 722.23(j))
Document each visit: duration, child's mood, activities

phases.name: BUILDING COMFORT (Week 3-4)
phases.goal: Transition to unsupervised visits at Andrew's home

schedule.activity: Full-day visits (8 hours) at Andrew's home

guidelines: Set up L.D.W.'s room with familiar items
Establish bedtime routine immediately
FaceTime/video calls on non-visit days
Share photos of visits with court/evaluator if required

phases.name: STANDARD PARENTING TIME (Week 5-8)
phases.goal: Achieve Michigan standard parenting time schedule
guidelines: This is the MINIMUM standard per Michigan FOC guidelines
Exchange locations should be neutral (police station, school)
Maintain communication log for all exchanges
Begin make-up time calculation — MCL 722.27a(8)

phases.name: EXPANDED TIME + MAKE-UP (Month 3-6)
phases.goal: Recover lost parenting time + establish 50/50 schedule
guidelines: Make-up time is MANDATORY — court SHALL grant it
Document all denied or shortened visits for make-up calculation
Request modification to joint physical custody if going well
File motion for equal parenting time if Emily resists

phases.name: LONG-TERM STABILITY (Month 6+)
phases.goal: Established co-parenting relationship with equal time

schedule.activity: Use OurFamilyWizard or similar co-parenting app

guidelines: Maintain detailed records of all exchanges and communications
If alienation continues, file for primary custody
Continue therapy for L.D.W. if recommended
Annual review of parenting plan per court order

professional_support.purpose: Independent assessment of L.D.W.'s best interests — MCL 722.24
Resolve day-to-day co-parenting disputes without court
Assess developmental impact of separation and recovery trajectory
